name: Maryanne's Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix crust ingredients: 2 cups graham cracker crumbs, 1/2 cup sugar, and 2/3 cup melted butter.
2. Combine the mixture in a large springform pan until well combined and press into the bottom and up the sides of the pan to form the crust.
3. In a separate bowl, beat together the cream cheese, butter, vanilla, sour cream, and lemon rind until smooth.
4. Pour the filling over the prepared crust.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 225 degrees Fahrenheit for 90 minutes.
6. Turn off the oven and allow the cheesecake to cool slowly on a wire rack.
7. Best made 2-3 days in advance.
